BETTER FUTURE Awards
We recognise Courage, Diversity and Excellence

We are the world’s largest network of design award programs - like to know more. Our global reach extends across12,000 brands and 3,500 studios. We come together to innovate, accelerate and grow demand for design. 

In 2024 we celebrated over $USD673Bn of design projects and raised the profile of over 2,900 design projects - want to know more?

A range of nominations are always open - browse our Awards Programs calendar to view the 2026 program schedule.
